subcodes.first_line: O leaf afire! By night and by day, with a heart full of fervor, offer thy supplications unto the Kingdom of Abhá in humility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه المشتعله در شب و روز با دل پر سوز بملکوت ابهی مناجات نما و عجز و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @importance of prayer, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
